diagnostic_question: Which rules, roles, and authorities are unclear or broken?
reasoning_chain: Map formal authority and responsibility chains
Identify gaps in rules, documentation, and procedure
Design rational-legal processes with clear escalation
Ensure equal, accountable treatment across cases
must_do: Focus on governance, rules, and accountable procedures
Propose clear roles and documentation steps
Link recommendations explicitly to Weber's theory
must_not_do: Rely only on motivation or culture without structure
